_comment: Template for nq-serve.service. Install as /etc/nq/aggregator.json and customize sources before starting the service.
_notifications_comment: Optional. Channels: discord, slack, webhook. min_severity: info | warning | critical. Empty channels disables outbound notifications. Set external_url when enabling channels so finding links use the operator-facing dashboard URL.
_liveness_comment: Optional. nq-monitor writes this artifact after each successful observation publish. It is a loop-checkpoint signal, not proof every follow-on detector, lifecycle, notification, seal, or self-probe step succeeded. The service user must be able to write its parent directory.
